title: Pouteria butyrocarpa
taxonomy: Pouteria butyrocarpa is classified as a species of plant in the family Sapotaceae. It is a member of the genus Pouteria, which consists of various species of evergreen trees and shrubs native to tropical regions. The Sapotaceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the sapote family, which includes over 900 species worldwide. Pouteria butyrocarpa is native to Australia, specifically in the tropical regions of Northern Territory and Western Australia. The classification of Pouteria butyrocarpa is still a subject of ongoing research in botany and taxonomy.
